title: Capybara Totem of Undying
description: A Simple texture pack that changes your Totem of Undying into a Capybara.
body:
this texture was made with my own 2 hands with insperation of 16x16 images i found on google

this is defenently NOT spywhare or malwhere or any of the whares you should download this.

his official name is Rular of Flesh but you may call him Jeremiah
